de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.Node

  • public class Node
extends Object

      Holds the undo methods for the information added by rules to the Goal.strategyInfos.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Node(Proof proof)
      creates an empty node that is root and leaf.
      Node(Proof proof, Sequent seq)
      creates a node with the given contents
      Node(Proof proof, Sequent seq, Node parent)
      creates a node with the given contents, the given collection of children (all elements must be of class Node) and the given parent node.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void add(Node child)
      makes the given node a child of this node.
      void addAll(Node[] newChildren)
      makes the given node a child of this node.
      void addNoPosTacletApp(NoPosTacletApp s)
      adds a new NoPosTacletApp to the set of available NoPosTacletApps at this node
      void addStrategyInfoUndoMethod(StrategyInfoUndoMethod undoMethod) 
      Node child(int i)
      returns i-th child
      int childrenCount()
      returns number of children
      Iterator<Node> childrenIterator()
      returns an iterator for the direct children of this node.
      void clearNameCache() 
      (package private) void clearNodeInfo() 
      (package private) Node close()
      marks a node as closed
      Node commonAncestor(Node p_node)
      Search for the node being the root of the smallest subtree containing this and p_node; we assume that the two nodes are part of the same proof tree
      int countBranches()
      retrieves number of branches
      int countNodes()
      retrieves number of nodes
      boolean find(Node node)
      searches for a given node in the subtree starting with this node

      int getChildNr(Node p_node) 
      ImmutableSet<ProgramVariable> getGlobalProgVars() 
      (package private) List<Node> getLeaves()
      computes the leaves of the current subtree and returns them

      Returns the set of NoPosTacletApps at this node

      the node information object encapsulates non-logical information of the node, e.g.
      ImmutableList<RenamingTable> getRenamingTable() 
      List<StrategyInfoUndoMethod> getStrategyInfoUndoMethods() 
      StringBuffer getUniqueTacletId() 
      private boolean isCloseable()
      checks if an inner node is closeable
      boolean isClosed() 
      Iterator<Node> iterator()
      Iterator over children.
      boolean leaf()
      returns true, iff this node is a leaf, i.e.
      Iterator<Node> leavesIterator()
      returns an iterator for the leaves of the subtree below this node.
      String name() 
      Node parent()
      returns the parent node of this node.
      Proof proof()
      returns the proof the Node belongs to
      (package private) void remove()
      removes child/parent relationship between this node and its parent; if this node is root nothing happens.
      (package private) boolean remove(Node child)
      removes child/parent relationship between the given node and this node; if the given node is not child of this node, nothing happens and then and only then false is returned.
      (package private) void reopen()
      Opens a previously closed node and all its closed parents.
      boolean root()
      returns true, iff this node is root, i.e.
      boolean sanityCheckDoubleLinks()
      checks if the parent has this node as child and continues recursively with the children of this node.
      Sequent sequent()
      returns the sequent of this node
      int serialNr() 
      void setAppliedRuleApp(RuleApp ruleApp) 
      void setGlobalProgVars(ImmutableSet<ProgramVariable> progVars)

      void setRenamings(ImmutableList<RenamingTable> list) 
      void setSequent(Sequent seq)
      sets the sequent at this node
      int siblingNr()
      returns the sibling number of this node or -1 if it is the root node
      Statistics statistics() 
      Iterator<Node> subtreeIterator()
      returns an iterator for all nodes in the subtree.

      • cachedName

        private String cachedName

      • localIntroducedRules

        private ImmutableSet<NoPosTacletApp> localIntroducedRules
        If the rule base has been extended e.g. by loading a new taclet as lemma or by applying a taclet with an addrule section on this node, then these taclets are stored in this list

      • undoInfoForStrategyInfo

        private final List<StrategyInfoUndoMethod> undoInfoForStrategyInfo
        Holds the undo methods for the information added by rules to the Goal.strategyInfos.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Node

        public Node(Proof proof)
        creates an empty node that is root and leaf.

      • Node

        public Node(Proof proof,
    Sequent seq)
        creates a node with the given contents

      • Node

        public Node(Proof proof,
    Sequent seq,
    Node parent)
        creates a node with the given contents, the given collection of children (all elements must be of class Node) and the given parent node.

      • setSequent

        sets the sequent at this node

        returns the sequent of this node

        the node information object encapsulates non-logical information of the node, e.g.
        Returns:

        public void addNoPosTacletApp(NoPosTacletApp s)
        adds a new NoPosTacletApp to the set of available NoPosTacletApps at this node

      • parent

        public Node parent()
        returns the parent node of this node.

      • leaf

        public boolean leaf()
        returns true, iff this node is a leaf, i.e. has no children.

      • find

        public boolean find(Node node)
        searches for a given node in the subtree starting with this node

      • commonAncestor

        public Node commonAncestor(Node p_node)
        Search for the node being the root of the smallest subtree containing this and p_node; we assume that the two nodes are part of the same proof tree

      • root

        public boolean root()
        returns true, iff this node is root, i.e. has no parents.

      • statistics

        public Statistics statistics()

      • add

        public void add(Node child)
        makes the given node a child of this node.

      • addAll

        public void addAll(Node[] newChildren)
        makes the given node a child of this node.

      • remove

        void remove()
        removes child/parent relationship between this node and its parent; if this node is root nothing happens. This is only used for testing purposes.

      • remove

        boolean remove(Node child)
        removes child/parent relationship between the given node and this node; if the given node is not child of this node, nothing happens and then and only then false is returned.
        Returns:
        false iff the given node was not child of this node and nothing has been done.

      • getLeaves

        List<Node> getLeaves()
        computes the leaves of the current subtree and returns them

      • leavesIterator

        public Iterator<Node> leavesIterator()
        returns an iterator for the leaves of the subtree below this node. The computation is called at every call!

      • childrenIterator

        public Iterator<Node> childrenIterator()
        returns an iterator for the direct children of this node.

      • subtreeIterator

        public Iterator<Node> subtreeIterator()
        returns an iterator for all nodes in the subtree.

      • childrenCount

        public int childrenCount()
        returns number of children

      • child

        public Node child(int i)
        returns i-th child

      • getChildNr

        public int getChildNr(Node p_node)
        Returns:
        the number of the node p_node, if it is a child of this node (starting with 0), -1 otherwise

      • getUniqueTacletId

        public StringBuffer getUniqueTacletId()

      • toString

        private StringBuffer toString(String prefix,
                    StringBuffer tree,
                    String preEnumeration,
                    int postNr,
                    int maxNr,
                    int ownNr)
        helps toString method
        Parameters:
        prefix - needed to keep track if a line has to be printed
        tree - the tree representation we want to add this subtree " @param preEnumeration the enumeration of the parent without the last number
        postNr - the last number of the parents enumeration
        maxNr - the number of nodes at this level
        ownNr - the place of this node at this level

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class Object

      • name

        public String name()

      • sanityCheckDoubleLinks

        public boolean sanityCheckDoubleLinks()
        checks if the parent has this node as child and continues recursively with the children of this node.
        Returns:
        true iff the parent of this node has this node as child and this condition holds also for the own children.

      • close

        Node close()
        marks a node as closed

      • reopen

        void reopen()
        Opens a previously closed node and all its closed parents.

        This is, for instance, needed for the join rule: In a situation where a join node and its associated partners have been closed and the join node is then pruned away, the partners have to be reopened again. Otherwise, we have a soundness issue.

      • isCloseable

        private boolean isCloseable()
        checks if an inner node is closeable

      • isClosed

        public boolean isClosed()

      • countNodes

        public int countNodes()
        retrieves number of nodes

      • countBranches

        public int countBranches()
        retrieves number of branches

      • serialNr

        public int serialNr()

      • siblingNr

        public int siblingNr()
        returns the sibling number of this node or -1 if it is the root node
        Returns:
        the sibling number of this node or -1 if it is the root node

      • getStrategyInfoUndoMethods

        public List<StrategyInfoUndoMethod> getStrategyInfoUndoMethods()

      • addStrategyInfoUndoMethod

        public void addStrategyInfoUndoMethod(StrategyInfoUndoMethod undoMethod)

      • iterator

        public Iterator<Node> iterator()
        Iterator over children. Use leavesIterator() if you need to iterate over leaves instead.
